name: Impossible Macaroni and Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
Approx. Cook Time: 40 minutes
Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease a 10x1 1/2" pie plate.
Mix together the two cups of Cheddar cheese and macaroni in the pie plate.
Beat the remaining ingredients (except for the 1/4 cup of shredded Cheddar cheese) in a blender until smooth for about 15 seconds.
Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, approximately 40 minutes.
Sprinkle with the 1/4 cup of shredded Cheddar cheese.
Bake until the cheese melts, for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Cool for 10 minutes.
